title: phleum phleoides var. interruptum
intro: Phleum phleoides var. interruptum, a variety of the timothy grass species, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Phleum phleoides var. interruptum are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of infusions, teas, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
